cases.prompt: vault에서 API 키 자동 inject 해줘

assertions.text: Checks KeePassXC vault status (path + keepassxc-cli presence) before injecting
Prompts for the master password once and injects all known entries into the current session
Reports which env vars were set, mapping entries like Zotero/Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini/GitHub PAT to ZOTERO_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, etc.

cases.prompt: Run keepass-inject to load my vault keys into this PowerShell session

assertions.text: Notes the master password lives in session memory only (SecureString), never saved to disk/registry/env, and must be re-run each new session
Uses Invoke-KeepassInject -Entry "Zotero API Key" to inject only ZOTERO_API_KEY
Passes the master password via keepassxc-cli stdin pipe rather than a CLI argument
